title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to platform stability and content organization. We fixed licensing issues that could cause activation loops and enhanced our automation skills library with better organization and expanded capabilities for revenue operations workflows.

entries.headline: Resolved license activation issues that could cause system loops
details: Fixed a problem where license validation could get stuck in an endless loop
Added warning notifications when licenses are approaching expiration

entries.headline: Enhanced automation skills library with better organization
details: Reorganized 98 automation skills for better discoverability
Improved naming and categorization of sales and marketing automation templates
Added new skill templates to help you build custom revenue operations workflows
